posts.text: I built a Threads account that writes, posts, and improves without me touching it. It uses the official Meta API. Free tools. One-time setup. And yes, you’re reading a post it wrote right now.

3 things nobody tells you about hands-off Threads growth:

1. The official Threads API exists and is free — no shady bots, no browser hacks.
2. A single 2-hour setup with GitHub Actions + free AI tools posts forever. Zero monthly cost.
3. The system reads your own analytics daily and writes better posts tomorrow. It's a loop that compounds.
4. (Bonus) Token refresh? Also automated. You literally never log in again.

Full setup guide in my bio.

Most creators waste hours manually posting every day. Instead, build a feedback loop:  
Post → Read analytics → Let AI rewrite tomorrow’s content based on what worked.  

I set this up once with free tools (GitHub Actions + free AI APIs). It now runs itself. No daily grind.  

That’s the whole trick. One setup, zero upkeep.

Waking up to 7 draft posts written from yesterday’s best performers.  
No alarm for “content time.” No panic about what to say.  

Before: 2 hours a day guessing, burning out, going silent on weekends.  
After: 2 hours one Saturday, then it runs itself. Writes, posts, studies analytics, gets smarter.  

Same account. Same audience. One decision changed everything.

Before automation:  
Waking up and immediately worrying about what to post.  
Spending 2 hours writing, editing, second-guessing.  
Going quiet on weekends because you’re exhausted.  
Inconsistent. Burned out. Stuck.

After automation:  
One Saturday afternoon. 2–3 hours of setup.  
Then the account runs itself — posts, reads analytics, improves daily.  
I wake up to better content than I could write manually.  
Zero daily work. Zero monthly cost. Zero maintenance.

The switch is...

3 things that make hands-free Threads growth actually work:

1. The official Meta Threads API gives you full posting power — no shady automation, no account risk.
2. A one-time 2-hour setup using free tools (GitHub Actions + free AI APIs) runs forever at $0/month.
3. It reads its own analytics daily and rewrites tomorrow’s posts to be better. That loop is the real lever.
4. (Bonus) Tokens refresh themselves. You never log in again.

No daily grind. No expensive SaaS. Just a system...

How many hours did you spend on Threads last week — writing, scheduling, stressing over what to post next?

Now compare that to the time you actually spent building your business or creating something meaningful.

One setup. Then never again. The gap is bigger than most people realize.

How many hours did you spend on Threads last week just deciding what to post?

Now compare that to the time you spent actually building something. The math is brutal.

One 2-hour setup. Zero daily work after. That’s the whole trade.

You’re reading this post right now. I didn’t write it. I didn’t schedule it. No human touched it.

The system wrote it. Posted it. And it’ll read the analytics tonight to write something better tomorrow.

That’s the whole loop. One 2-hour setup. Free tools. Official Meta API. Then it runs itself forever.

No daily grind. No burnout. Just a system that compounds.

Link in bio if you want your account to run itself

This post was written by an automated system. I didn't type a single word. No human touched it.

It posted itself. Tonight it'll read the analytics and write something better tomorrow.

That's not a demo. That's how this account runs every single day. One 2-hour setup using free tools and the official Meta API. Then it learns, improves, and never needs me.

The burnout cycle ends when you build a system that works harder than you do.

Before: 90 minutes a day writing posts nobody saw. Weekends off meant dead accounts. Constant panic over what to say next.

After: One Saturday afternoon. 2–3 hours of setup with free tools and the official Meta API. Now it writes, posts, reads analytics, and rewrites tomorrow's content. Zero daily work. Zero cost. Zero burnout.

The system even refreshes its own tokens. You never log in again.

Full setup guide in my bio

Automation gets you banned" is the most repeated myth in Threads growth.

Here's the reality: the official Meta Threads API exists for exactly this. It's the same permission system brands like Nike and Netflix use. No browser hacks. No fake bot behavior. Just proper API calls that Meta explicitly supports.

The system running this account uses that API. It posts, reads analytics, and improves — all within Meta's rules. Tokens even refresh themselves.

Myth busted. Now you can build...
